jsonLd.title: ProSport is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, ProSport in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ProSport:
ProSport is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ProSport!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
